description_long: This bungalow features a single-story, rectangular structure with a broad, low-pitched roof and a prominent front entrance. The facade includes a central doorway flanked by large, horizontally-aligned windows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front yard is landscaped with two trees and a driveway, where a car is parked, suggesting residential use. The side and rear elevations show additional windows, maintaining a consistent window pattern around the building. The roof is expansive and flat, with minimal overhang, and the exterior walls appear to be finished in a smooth, uniform material. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on accessibility and open space around the building.
description: A single-story bungalow with a flat, broad roof, large front windows, and landscaped front yard with driveway and car. The design is simple, functional, and residential.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, landscaped yard, and driveway with a car.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side windows, driveway, and part of the landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back windows and the flat, continuous roofline.
description_view_3: Right side view with additional windows and a clear view of the yard and driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with consistent side and rear window placement
